title: Sqlitelogictest queries fail to execute
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Test entry 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 100, 'Test entry 2');
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value IS NULL OR value = 0 THEN NULL ELSE value * 10 END AS adjusted_value FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT -5 * NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table), 0) + 20 AS result;
key_bug_features: Queries with NULLIF and complex arithmetic fail
